name: Texas Panhandle Style Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute bacon in a Dutch oven over a moderate flame until it begins to color.
2. Add beef, onions, garlic, and chiles to the bacon. Heat and stir until well browned.
3. In a dry skillet over a high flame, heat cumin seed for 5 minutes.
4. Add cumin and remaining ingredients to the beef mixture. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 60-90 minutes, stirring often.
5. Serve hot.
